profile.name: Ekenedirichukwu (Kaycee) Ude
profile.title: IT Professional
profile.headline: Data-Driven IT Professional | Securing and Optimizing Enterprise Systems
profile.bio: A recent Information Technology graduate from Kennesaw State University with hands-on experience in data analytics, cybersecurity, enterprise virtualization, and database management. I build and secure resilient systems that turn complex data into actionable insights.

projects.title: Data-Driven Energy Solutions
projects.short: Analyzed 240,000+ household energy records to build an Excel dashboard for identifying waste and reducing operational costs.
projects.detailHeader: Data-Driven Energy Solutions: From Raw Data to Cost-Saving Insights
projects.full: For my senior capstone, I led a project to analyze over 240,000 smart home energy consumption records to identify waste patterns. The process involved data cleaning with Python, in-depth analysis, and the creation of an interactive dashboard in Excel.
achievements: Identified peak energy consumption between 7:00 PM and 10:00 PM.
Discovered Sub-meter 3 (Air Conditioner & Water Heater) as the #1 energy consumer.
Successfully identified a sensor data anomaly on April 29th.

projects.title: Predictive Modeling for Healthcare Outcomes
projects.short: Built and evaluated a Boosted Decision Tree model in Azure ML to predict patient hospital stay length, achieving 95.98% accuracy.
projects.detailHeader: Using Machine Learning to Predict Hospital Length of Stay
projects.full: I developed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline in Microsoft Azure ML Studio to predict patient length of stay. After ingesting a dataset of hospital records, I performed data cleaning, feature selection, and model training.
achievements: Trained a model that achieved a Coefficient of Determination (R²) of 0.9598.
Engineered a full pipeline from data ingestion and cleaning to model scoring and evaluation.

projects.title: Enterprise Cybersecurity & Network Analysis
projects.short: Evaluated EDR solutions for a 5,000+ endpoint environment and analyzed TCP/IP and HTTP traffic using Wireshark.
projects.detailHeader: Securing Endpoints and Analyzing Network Traffic
projects.full: This project combines several assignments focused on enterprise security. I evaluated leading Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) solutions for a distributed retail company with over 5,000 devices.
achievements: Authored a formal recommendation for an EDR solution for a 5,000+ device network.
Successfully decoded TCP and UDP sessions to troubleshoot connectivity.
Demonstrated practical knowledge of asymmetric encryption and hashing algorithms.

projects.title: Multi-Platform Database Management
projects.short: Designed and managed relational (Oracle SQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases, implementing triggers, views, and aggregation pipelines.
projects.full: This project showcases my versatility in database design, implementation, and management across different platforms. I designed a relational schema and built a database in Oracle SQL, writing complex queries, procedures, and triggers.
achievements: Designed an Oracle database with foreign key constraints, indexes, and triggers for history logging.
Wrote a MongoDB aggregation query to calculate average scores across different assessment types.
Created a view in Oracle SQL to join tables and simplify data access.

projects.title: Enterprise Virtualization & Systems Architecture
projects.short: Designed a VMware vSphere virtualization solution for an enterprise scaling from 15,000 to 20,000 employees.
projects.detailHeader: Designing Scalable and Resilient IT Infrastructure
projects.full: I analyzed and designed a virtual infrastructure solution capable of supporting an enterprise scaling from 15,000 to 20,000 employees. I recommended VMware vSphere based on its scalability, high availability (HA), and centralized management features.
achievements: Authored a detailed proposal specifying hardware, networking (40-100 Gbps backbone), and storage (200+ TB SAN/NAS) requirements.
Outlined a 5-year support plan covering maintenance, capacity planning, security, and staff training.

projects.title: Enterprise CI/CD & GitOps Pipeline
projects.short: Led the GitOps/Kubernetes workstream on a 5-person capstone team, building a Jenkins → Docker → Trivy → ArgoCD → Kubernetes pipeline with Prometheus/Grafana monitoring.
projects.detailHeader: Building a Secure, Automated GitOps Delivery Pipeline
projects.full: As part of a 5-person capstone team, I served as the GitOps/Kubernetes lead on a 10-week project to build a production-style CI/CD pipeline for a containerized Flask application. Code moves from a GitHub push to a running, monitored Kubernetes workload automatically.
achievements: Led the GitOps/Kubernetes workstream across a 10-week, 5-person capstone, taking deployments from a manual process to a fully automated ArgoCD GitOps workflow.
Migrated raw Kubernetes manifests to a parameterized Helm chart, enabling config-driven, auto-synced, self-healing deployments.
Implemented least-privilege RBAC with separate service accounts for the application and the GitOps deployer, plus Kubernetes Secrets for credential management.
Contributed to a full DevSecOps loop — Jenkins CI, Docker builds, Trivy filesystem/image scanning, ArgoCD delivery, and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring across 3 custom dashboards.
